svg.text: 2 surfaces — Pilih Peran (role switcher) · Pilih Sekolah (school switcher) · brand-aligned bottom sheets · Bahasa-only

g.text: Bottom sheet · brand-azure header icon · role-tinted gradient avatars
Active role gets a tinted card + AKTIF badge + check disc
Other roles show chevron affordance, tap → switch + close
Bottom sheet · search bar · initials avatars (brand-azure for active, slate for others)
Address subtitle + jenjang chip + status chip (Aktif sekarang / N anak terdaftar)
Pull-to-refresh hint at the bottom for parents with many schools
on tap. Drag down OR tap scrim
Flow · what happens when the user taps
From AppBar pill or account sheet
Catatan: tidak ada tombol Batal — bottom sheet sudah punya gestur drag-down + tap scrim. Cuma "tutup" jika user tidak jadi ganti.
